productTitle: GameSir G7 Pro 8K Aimlabs PC ワイヤレスゲーミングコントローラー PC対応 8000Hz有線/2.4G超高速ポーリングレート TMR第2世代ホール効果スティック デュアルトリガーストップ 4背面ボタン マクロ機能 Bluetooth/2.4G/有線接続 Steam対応 ドリフト防止 光学式ABXYボタン ジャイロ搭載 振動モーター 3.5mm対応 eスポーツ向け プロ仕様ゲームパッド（Aimlabs公式ライセンス）

reviews.title: !Impresionante!
reviews.body: Me ha impresionado mucho este mando, por su calidad, materiales y tacto y sobretodo por su jugabilidad. Siempre he tenido el Elite Control de Xbox y este le da mil vueltas en todo, a ver qué tal su fiabilidad, de momento muy contento con el.
reviews.date: 2026年5月10日にスペインでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Massive Improvement Over Standard G7 Pro
reviews.body: The first thing I noticed with the GameSir G7 Pro 8K is the completely revamped D-pad, and it’s a major improvement over the standard GameSir G7 Pro. On the original model, the D-pad felt mushy, loose, and had significant input bleed, which made precise directional inputs frustrating—especially in games that require speed and accuracy. Calling in stratagems in Helldivers 2 was particularly inconsistent at times. On the 8K version, the D-pad feels much tighter and more controlled, and the included alternate D-pad options help reduce accidental inputs even further. You can also lock out diagonal inputs in software, which minimizes any remaining input bleed. It still doesn’t fully pass the classic “Contra test” for precision purists, but it’s a dramatic improvement and far more usable in real gameplay.The second standout upgrade is the gyro implementation, which feels night and day compared to the standard G7 Pro. When mapped as mouse input, gyro aiming is noticeably smoother, faster, and more responsive. On the older G7 Pro, mouse gyro was usable but inconsistent enough that I often reverted to right stick output. Here, it feels much closer to something you’d actually want to use long term on PC. Despite the 8K branding, I personally kept the polling rate set to 1K—the higher rate wasn’t my main reason for upgrading. It was the overall refinements and improvements that made the difference.Compared to the Champion Edition, I actually prefer the Aim Labs edition overall. The black and gold aesthetic on the Champion Edition looks great out of the box and feels more premium at first, but the grips are a weak point. After about two weeks of use, I started noticing visible wear and staining on the rubber coating—even with clean hands before every session. That soft-touch finish feels nice initially, but it wears down quickly and becomes shiny over time. The Aim Labs edition avoids this by using a textured plastic grip instead, which feels more durable and consistent long term. The Champion Edition feels more luxurious at first touch, but it doesn’t hold up as well with regular use.The GameSir app is also solid overall and adds meaningful customization, though I was a bit disappointed that only the R/L/4/5 buttons can be assigned as shift-layer or macro triggers. If you dedicate one as a shift key, you can get up to six macro inputs, but in practice L4 and R4 are usually better used for core gameplay actions. That leaves most setups with around four practical macro buttons. I mapped mine to stratagems in HellDivers 2, and they worked very well. You can also copy profiles between controllers, which made it easy to transfer my setup from the Champion Edition to the Aim Labs version.Overall, by dropping Xbox licensing constraints, this feels like a much less compromised, PC-focused controller. It’s clear GameSir used that freedom to improve features that matter more to PC players rather than sticking to console-first limitations.
reviews.date: 2026年5月1日にアメリカ合衆国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Great controller for this price. Ugly DPad though lol
reviews.body: Gold DPad is Ugly and I doubt anyone has ever received a full set of the “random” spare Teal thumb sticks lol.. but other than that.. Everything else looks/feels very good.Great controller for the price and all being well it should last years as it shouldn’t suffer from stick drift.. unlike my dualsense edge which likes to eat thumb sticks at £40 per set.. and I could buy 2 of these controllers for the price of the duelsense.Please sell separate DPads in the grey colour from the older version 😂
reviews.date: 2026年5月11日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Recommend!!
reviews.body: Had every controller there is and been using the edge for the last couple years but figured id try this beauty out and im impressed. Feels amazing with really good software thats not annoying or buggy. Definitely using this for the next while. Definitely recommend 👌
reviews.date: 2026年5月10日にカナダでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Más valor del esperado
reviews.body: La verdad se siente mucho más premium de lo que cuesta, yo lo agarré en 1666 mxn y lo compare con diferentes controles, siento que este le gana incluso a controles más caros en términos de valor y funcionalidad, los materiales son de muy buena calidad y el software es fácil de usar, con los 8k Hz y los micro ajustes en zonas muertas si puedes eliminar mucha latencia, lo único malo que no se le puede ajustar la tensión a los gatillos (aunque si se vuelven click mecánico) ni a las palancas pero de ahí en más yo creo que por el precio deja atrás a muchos controles de la misma gama, no me arrepiento, excelente control
reviews.date: 2026年5月10日にメキシコでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Des améliorations qui font la différence !
reviews.body: Manette tout simplement exceptionnelle, surtout niveau performance et particulièrement pour les FPS.- La latence filaire que se soit en 1000hz 4000 ou 8000hz est actuellement dans les plus basse sur le marché. Même en wireless c'est top.- Les sticks sont des TMR js13 pro de chez K-Silver. Ce sont les plus linéaires actuellement ils se rapprochent énormément des sticks ALPS. Très bien implémenter dans cette manette.- Ergonomie top (main 19x10), mes index tombent bien sûr les triggers et bumpers et aucune difficultés à presser les deux boutons additionnels. Très bonne qualité de fabrication également. Palette à l'arrière plus silencieuses que sur la G7 pro "classique".- Boutons en façade qualitatif, beau design, faceplate interchangeable.-Cable tressé très long, stick additionnel reçu couleur cyan et non noir pour ma part! Dock de charge avec port USB pour insérer le dongle à l'intérieur.- L application gamesir connect au top, c'est lisible et bien organisé comparé à d'autres.- Seul point négatif le d-pad. Il a été amélioré par rapport a la G7 pro mais ça reste bof.Sur PC, c'est une référence.Et pour le prix franchement comparé à certaines compagnies qui vendent des manettes dégueulasse à+de 250-300 euros, c'est un must have foncez les yeux fermés !
reviews.date: 2026年5月9日にフランスでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Gelungene Evolution des originalen G7 Pro
reviews.body: Nachdem mich der originale G7 Pro bereits begeistert hatte, wollte ich unbedingt die 8k Version.Speziell das D-Pad fühlt sich fester an. Beim drücken hat man jetzt mehr Widerstand, wobei mich das beim alten G7 Pro (nach kurzer Eingewöhnung) nicht wirklich stört.Die Bumper sollen wohl überarbeitet worden sein, damit der Fehler von RT nicht mehr auftritt.Allerdings hatte ich diesen Fehler selbst beim originalen G7 Pro nicht und der hat mittlerweile über 1000h hinter sich.Was etwas nervig ist, dass man für die 8K Edition wieder eine andere Software benötigt. Dafür kann man mit dieser jetzt Makros implementieren (Turbomodus etc.).Alles in allem würde ich heute direkt zur V2 Version greifen, weil es das ausgereiftere Produkt ist.Achja:Konsoleros sollten bedenken, dass die V2 Version keine Konsolenunterstützung mehr bietet, daher kann ich nicht sagen ob und wie dieser damit funktioniert.
reviews.date: 2026年5月7日にドイツでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Simply an amazing controller.
reviews.body: A fantastic controller,much better than the already amazing g7 pro,that I also have.The g7 pro 8k just feels so much better,especially the dpad.I have had many budget to high end controllers,from many manufacturers.Im a huge fan of gamesir! They are my go to for controllers.
reviews.date: 2026年5月8日にアメリカ合衆国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Manette actuellement imbattable sur le marché compétitif
reviews.body: De loin la meilleure manette avec laquelle j’ai joué de toute ma vie. Jouant au fps depuis black ops 1, j’ai eu l’occasion de passer par tout les fabricants de manette et suivre leur evolution dans le temps ! Et gamesir nous a pondu une machine de guerre ! Tmr jk Silver13pro, 8k de pollings htz, 1ms de latence max sur les boutons et les stick… J’ai aucun doute sur le fait qu’elle soit actuellement l’une des meilleures options ( ceux qui aiment le format manette ps4 attendez sa version tarentula 8k).. Des stick à 7% d’erreur de circularité en mode raw et 0 en mode circulaire. On a enfin des composants idéal à un prix idéal!! Un vrai gap pour les joueurs pc uniquement qui souhaitent passer d’une g7 pro basique à un monstre de compétition.
reviews.date: 2026年5月8日にフランスでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Sehr nice!
reviews.body: Top endlich ein Xbox Controller am pc der auf 8K poll rate geht - perfekt für CoD ranked anstatt nen Dual Sense zu overclocken für Xbox OG Fans perfektEinen kleinen Softwarefehler gibt es - binden der Tasten gibt es manchmal einen Bug dass die Tasten öfters ausgelöst werden hierfür in der App unter Kalibrieren gehen wo man das Layout sieht damit man die Tasten sieht wenn sie gedrückt werden.
reviews.date: 2026年5月9日にドイツでレビュー済み

reviews.title: Quality control is a major concern. right trigger issue Within three days.
reviews.body: This controller only lasted me three days. The right trigger got stuck at 100% without pressing it. If I pressed the left trigger, it would put the right trigger at 100% and then initiate turbo mode. I spoke to GameSir and tried to reflash the firmware and do resets, but for the three days I had it, I was extremely happy with it. Quality control is a major concern. I may buy another one, and we'll hope for the best. Also, I did get the TIL joysticks with my first order.Also, this controller uses GameSir Connect, whereas the G7 Pro, non-8K, uses the Nexus app. This is to do with Xbox licensing, but the Connect app is a lot better. I have more control with macros, and in shift mode, I'm able to control my hardware PC with mouse and keyboard shortcuts.GameSir should sell individual faceplates, grips, and D-pad colours with the variants. Would like an all-black version of this controller.Other than the faulty trigger, which happened within 3 days and maybe 4 hours of gameplay, it's a good controller. But again, I do worry about buying another one.
reviews.date: 2026年5月13日に英国でレビュー済み
